name: First Bank
description_short: Strasburg, VA branch of First Bank at 112 W King St offers core banking services.
description_long:
The First Bank branch at 112 W King St is located in downtown Strasburg, VA, serving the community's banking needs. As a standalone branch location, this Strasburg office provides essential financial services during standard banking hours.

This Strasburg, VA location offers deposits, withdrawals, account management, and financial consultation. For specific service details available at this branch, contact the location directly.

Strasburg residents can visit this First Bank location to handle routine banking needs and transactions. Bring your ID and relevant documentation for account services. This is a full-service banking option conveniently located in downtown Strasburg.
services: Mortgage lending and home equity lines of credit
Visa check cards and ATM cards
Credit cards with CardCash™ Rewards Program
Online and mobile banking with 24/7 access
Mobile wallet integration for card payments
Positive Pay fraud protection for business customers
Treasury management and payroll services for businesses
Wealth management including investment accounts, trusts, and estate planning
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full U.S. Government faith and credit
24/7 access to banking via online, mobile, and telephone channels
Mobile wallet integration allowing Visa check card addition to mobile devices and smartwatches
Positive Pay fraud protection service for business customers monitoring check activity
Comprehensive personal and business product suite including mortgages, auto loans, credit cards, and wealth management
Industry-specific business lending for healthcare, municipal, hospitality, and non-profit sectors
Security-first messaging with clear commitment never to solicit personal information via unsecured channels
cons: Website content does not disclose specific interest rates, APRs, or fee structures for accounts and products
No mention of account minimums, balance requirements, or promotional incentives for opening accounts
Limited information about digital banking features or mobile app capabilities beyond basic online/mobile banking reference
best_for: Virginia residents and business owners seeking a full-service community bank with local branch access
Customers prioritizing security and fraud prevention across personal and business accounts
Businesses in healthcare, municipal government, hospitality, and non-profit sectors with industry-specific lending needs
diagnosis: First Bank is best for Virginia customers and businesses seeking comprehensive banking services with local branch relationships and strong security practices. The main caveat is that specific product rates, fees, and account minimums are not disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact with the bank for pricing and comparison shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First Bank at 112 W King St, Strasburg, VA. Full-service banking branch.
